Get Started

Enhance Efficiency with Cura Assist

  • Save Time

Over one-third of consultation time is spent on documentation. Cura Assist takes this burden away from clinicians, allowing them to focus on patient care.

  • Save Resources

Cura Assist can save an average of 10 Clinic appointments a day, by reducing time spent on documentation.

  • Reduce Burnout

Cura Assist reduces clinician burnout by removing mundane administrative tasks.

  • Increase Satisfaction

Cura Assist improves patient experience by allowing clinicians to focus on care instead of computer screens.

FAQs

What can Cura Assist be used for?
  • Clerking's
  • Clinic letters
  • Ward rounds
  • Operative notes
  • Discharge summaries
Is Cura Assist data secure?

Yes, all data is encrypted in transit and not retained. Cura Assist is fully GDPR compliant with industry-leading security.

Do we store patient data?

Cura Assist does not retain any personal data.
